footer.appTagline: Planar Nexus - A generic card game platform
footer.legal: Planar Nexus is unofficial Fan Content permitted under the Fan Content Policy. Not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. ©Wizards of the Coast LLC.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Your command center for epic Planar Nexus battles.

deckBuilder.title: Deck Builder
deckBuilder.description: Craft and fine-tune your decks with a powerful editor and vast card library.

aiDeckCoach.title: AI Deck Coach
aiDeckCoach.description: Get expert analysis on your deck. The AI coach provides insights on strategy and suggests improvements.

singlePlayer.title: Single Player
singlePlayer.description: Test your creations against an AI opponent or practice your combos in self-play mode.

spectator.title: Spectator Mode
spectator.description: Watch two AI opponents battle it out with play-by-play commentary. Learn from the best strategies.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer
multiplayer.description: Challenge your friends to a 4-player game. The ultimate battle of wits awaits.
